calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Vacate Order Of Dec. 26,2006 And Enter First Amended Order Approving Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John Quincy Adams, Jr. And Seneca One, Llc
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER SENECA ONE LLC'S Motion To Vacate Order Of Dec. 26, 2006, And Enter First Amended Order Approving Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John Quincy Adams, Jr. And Seneca One, LLC is granted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Renewed Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John John Quincy Adams, Jr. And Seneca One, Llc, Pursuant To California Isurance Code
Off Calendar Dec-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearances:
Christopher Milton, Esq., 818-547-9740 for petitioner and moving party Seneca One LLP
Dixon Kummer, Esq. , 661-324-2700 for defendant and opposing party John Quincy Adams Jr.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER SENECA ONE LLC'S Renewed Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John John Quincy Adams, Jr. And Seneca One, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PETITIONER WILL SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189. (301/PJB/)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John John Quincy Adams, Jr. And Seneca One, Llc, Pursuant To California Isurance Code
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, 922-5939, appearing for petitioner and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. There being no compliance with the tentative ruling rule, no argument was heard. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER SENECA ONE LLC'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between John Quincy Adams, Jr. And Seneca One, LLC, Pursuant To California Insurance Code is denied. Proof of service is not valid. "I caused" does not show personal knowledge. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
